author: codex
rationale: The repo cut over in place and removed the handoff-plus-mixed-log model, so one current-state path is now the only supported memory workflow.
statement: Use only the v2 memory tree: always-loaded briefs, subsystem packs, and typed history.

author: codex
rationale: DECISION_PLAN.md was tightened into an operating decision record, and the roadmap, README, and architecture pack were aligned so future sessions stop treating mixed LBA2-shaped runtime seams as already-generic engine core.
statement: Keep near-term execution parity-first and evidence-first for LBA2, but only call code engine core after explicit extraction satisfies the promotion rules in DECISION_PLAN.md.
